name: v1.5.3
body:
## Important change
This reverts the websockets package back to https://github.com/gorilla/websocket/commit/931041c5ee6de24fe9cba1aa16f1a0b910284d6d

## What's Changed
* Fixes subprotocol selection (aling with rfc6455) by @KSDaemon in https://github.com/gorilla/websocket/pull/823
* Update README.md, replace master to main by @mstmdev in https://github.com/gorilla/websocket/pull/862
* Use status code constant by @mstmdev in https://github.com/gorilla/websocket/pull/864
* conn.go: default close handler should not return ErrCloseSent. by @pnx in https://github.com/gorilla/websocket/pull/865
* fix: replace ioutil.readfile with os.readfile by @rfyiamcool in https://github.com/gorilla/websocket/pull/868
* fix: add comment for the readBufferSize and writeBufferSize by @rfyiamcool in https://github.com/gorilla/websocket/pull/869
* Remove noisy printf in NextReader() and beginMessage() by @bcreane in https://github.com/gorilla/websocket/pull/878
* docs(echoreadall): fix function echoReadAll comment by @XdpCs in https://github.com/gorilla/websocket/pull/881
* make tests parallel by @ninedraft in https://github.com/gorilla/websocket/pull/872
* Upgrader.Upgrade: use http.ResposnseController by @ninedraft in https://github.com/gorilla/websocket/pull/871
* Do not handle network error in `SetCloseHandler()` by @nak3 in https://github.com/gorilla/websocket/pull/863
* perf: reduce timer in write_control by @rfyiamcool in https://github.com/gorilla/websocket/pull/879
* fix: lint example code by @rfyiamcool in https://github.com/gorilla/websocket/pull/890
* feat: format message type by @rfyiamcool in https://github.com/gorilla/websocket/pull/889
* Remove hideTempErr to allow downstream users to check for errors like net.ErrClosed by @UnAfraid in https://github.com/gorilla/websocket/pull/894
* Do not timeout when WriteControl deadline is zero in https://github.com/gorilla/websocket/pull/898
* Excludes errchecks linter by @apoorvajagtap in https://github.com/gorilla/websocket/pull/904
* Return errors instead of printing to logs by @apoorvajagtap in https://github.com/gorilla/websocket/pull/897
* Revert " Update go version & add verification/testing tools (#840)" by @apoorvajagtap in https://github.com/gorilla/websocket/pull/908
* Fixes broken random value generation by @apoorvajagtap in https://github.com/gorilla/websocket/pull/926
* Reverts back to v1.5.0 by @apoorvajagtap in https://github.com/gorilla/websocket/pull/929

## New Contributors
* @KSDaemon made their first contribution in https://github.com/gorilla/websocket/pull/823
* @mstmdev made their first contribution in https://github.com/gorilla/websocket/pull/862
* @pnx made their first contribution in https://github.com/gorilla/websocket/pull/865
* @rfyiamcool made their first contribution in https://github.com/gorilla/websocket/pull/868
* @bcreane made their first contribution in https://github.com/gorilla/websocket/pull/878
* @XdpCs made their first contribution in https://github.com/gorilla/websocket/pull/881
* @ninedraft made their first contribution in https://github.com/gorilla/websocket/pull/872
* @nak3 made their first contribution in https://github.com/gorilla/websocket/pull/863
* @UnAfraid made their first contribution in https://github.com/gorilla/websocket/pull/894
* @apoorvajagtap made their first contribution in https://github.com/gorilla/websocket/pull/904

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/gorilla/websocket/compare/v1.5.1...v1.5.3
